hero.subtitle: Collect, manage, and respond to all customer support requests in one centralized place. Help your team resolve tickets faster, more professionally, and never miss a beat.
hero.ticket_body: Hi, I've been trying to log in for the past hour but keep getting an error message...
hero.ai_reply: "Hi Alice, sorry for the trouble! Let me help you get back in. Could you try resetting your password using the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page?"

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about SupportHub — from setup to advanced features.

faq_1.q: How does SupportHub integrate with my existing tools?
faq_1.a: SupportHub connects with popular tools like Slack, Gmail, Zendesk, and many more via our API. You can set up integrations in minutes from the dashboard without any coding.

faq_2.q: Can I customize ticket statuses and workflows?
faq_2.a: Yes. You can create custom ticket statuses, priority levels, and automation rules tailored to your team's workflow. Our drag-and-drop builder makes it easy to design your ideal process.

faq_3.q: Is there a limit on how many tickets my team can handle?
faq_3.a: No. Our platform is designed to scale with your team. Whether you handle 100 or 100,000 tickets a month, SupportHub handles it without performance degradation.

faq_4.q: How does the AI-assisted reply work?
faq_4.a: Our AI analyzes past conversations, knowledge base articles, and the current ticket context to draft suggested replies. Agents can review, edit, and send with one click — saving hours every day.

faq_5.q: Can my customers track their ticket status?
faq_5.a: Absolutely. You can enable a customer portal where users can view, comment on, and track their tickets in real time. It reduces inbound inquiries and keeps customers informed.

faq_6.q: What kind of support and training do you offer?
faq_6.a: We offer 24/7 email and chat support for all plans. Enterprise customers get a dedicated account manager, onboarding session, and priority support. Our knowledge base and video tutorials are available around the clock.

how_it_works.title: How it works
how_it_works.subtitle: From submission to resolution — a seamless workflow for your support team.

submit.title: Submit a Ticket
submit.desc: Customers submit requests through your preferred channel — web form, email, or in-app.

assign.title: Auto Assignment
assign.desc: Our system intelligently routes each ticket to the most qualified agent based on skill, workload, and urgency.

respond.title: Respond & Collaborate
respond.desc: Agents reply directly or collaborate internally to craft the best solution with AI-assisted suggestions.

resolve.title: Resolve & Close
resolve.desc: Once the issue is resolved, the ticket is closed and the customer is invited to rate their experience.

features.title: Everything you need to handle support
features.subtitle: Tools designed for support teams — from ticket intake to resolution, all in one place.

ticket_management.title: Ticket Management
ticket_management.desc: Create, assign, and track support tickets from a single dashboard. Never lose a customer request again.

smart_routing.title: Smart Routing
smart_routing.desc: Automatically assign tickets to the right agent based on skill, workload, and priority level.

real_time_collab.title: Real-time Collaboration
real_time_collab.desc: Agents can discuss tickets internally, share notes, and resolve issues faster as a team.

analytics.title: Analytics & Insights
analytics.desc: Monitor response times, resolution rates, and team performance with detailed reports.

notifications.title: Instant Notifications
notifications.desc: Get alerted instantly via email or in-app when a new ticket arrives or a status changes.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.desc: Role-based access control, encrypted data, and audit logs to keep customer data safe.

rating.title: Loved by support teams
rating.subtitle: Hear from customer support leaders who use SupportHub to deliver exceptional service every day.
rating.testimonial_1: Switching to SupportHub cut our average response time in half. The smart routing is a game-changer for a team our size.
rating.testimonial_2: We went from scattered emails to a single platform. Our CSAT score jumped from 82% to 96% in just three months.
rating.testimonial_3: The AI-assisted replies save our agents hours every week. It's like having an extra team member who never sleeps.

stats.title: Our Impact in Numbers
stats.subtitle: Every metric reflects our commitment to helping support teams deliver faster, better service.
